hr-1041-119.title: Veterans 2nd Amendment Protection Act Advances in House Committee
hr-1041-119.snippet: The Veterans 2nd Amendment Protection Act advanced in the Veterans' Affairs Committee Tuesday, inching closer to restoring vets' gun rights.

hr-7343-119.title: Watch Live: House Debates Bill to Deport Illegal Aliens Who Assault Police After NYPD Attack
hr-7343-119.snippet: The House Judiciary Committee will mark up several bills including HR 7343 which would require the deportation of illegal aliens who assault police.
